# Lemlist — Pricing

## Plans (per user per month)

| Plan | Monthly/user | Annual/user | Email Senders | LinkedIn | Unified Inbox |
|------|-------------|-------------|---------------|----------|---------------|
| Email Pro | $63 | $79 | 3 per user | — | — |
| Multichannel Expert | $87 | $109 | 5 per user | ✓ | ✓ |
| Enterprise | Custom | Custom | 5+ per user | ✓ | ✓ |

*Annual = ~20% discount.*

## Add-ons
- Additional email senders: $9/email account/mo (any plan)
- Phone/Calling: $15/number/mo + $20/user/mo (Multichannel Expert) — included in Enterprise
- WhatsApp: $20/user/mo (Multichannel Expert add-on)
- Dedicated account manager: Enterprise only
- SSO/SAML: Enterprise only

## Credit / Usage Model
- Per-seat pricing — cost grows linearly with team size
- Warm-up (Lemwarm) included in all plans at no extra cost
- Lead database (600M+ contacts) access included
- AI personalisation (icebreakers, sequence generator) included in all plans

## TCO Notes
- Most expensive per-seat in the category for teams — 5 users on Multichannel Expert = $435/mo monthly
- LinkedIn automation is a $24/user/mo premium over Email Pro — evaluate if multichannel is actually needed
- Solo or 1–2 person teams: very competitive at $63–$87/user
- Lemlist is the only native multichannel platform (email + LinkedIn + calls) — the premium is justified for complex sequences
- Compare against Instantly ($97 flat, unlimited seats) for teams of 3+
